data.name: Miho Adventures
data.detailed_description:
Miho adventures is a platformer pixel game where you control Miho in an adventure across an island filled with monsters and enemies of all kinds.
Defeat all of them and make them submit to you as their master.

The game contains:
32 levels (4 bosses)
12 unlockable images
5 different outfits
1 H animation for each enemy

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: Core 2 Duo

  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
